text:
Once upon a time, there lived a girl named Willow. She loved to read. One day, she found an old book. She read about a girl who lived in ancient times. The girl had wings like birds. She liked to fly. Willow wished she could fly like that girl.

One day, Willow flew her kite above the city. People liked her kite. The birds liked her. They bird-watched. They loved her.

Willow lived happily ever after. She flew her kite every day. Sometimes she danced like a bird. Everyone loved her. Everyone liked her wings. Everyone liked Willow.
